query:
SELECT id, orderNumber, orderStatus, customerName, userId
FROM orders
WHERE orderStatus = 'cancelled'
ORDER BY orderNumber DESC
LIMIT 10;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT id, orderNumber, orderStatus, customerName, userId
FROM orders
WHERE orderStatus = 'cancelled'
ORDER BY orderNumber DESC
LIMIT 10;
